name: if_assets
query:
SELECT 
  a.asset_id,
  a.name,
  a.type_image,
  a.type_drawing,
  a.line,
  a.stage_id,
  o.availability,
  o.performance,
  o.quality,

  ROUND(o.availability * o.performance * o.quality, 2) AS oee_value,

  CASE
    WHEN ROUND(o.availability * o.performance * o.quality, 2) >= 0.85 THEN 0
    WHEN ROUND(o.availability * o.performance * o.quality, 2) >= 0.70 THEN 1
    ELSE 2
  END AS status_alert

FROM 
  if_assets a 
LEFT JOIN 
  if_assets_oee o ON a.asset_id = o.asset_id

GROUP BY 
  a.asset_id, a.name, a.type_image, a.type_drawing, a.line, a.stage_id,
  o.availability, o.performance, o.quality
ORDER BY 
  a.asset_id, a.stage_id;
